heading: Violations; misdemeanor; penalties
label: 1212 Violations; misdemeanor; penalties
text: Any person who violates shall be guilty of a misdemeanor and shall, upon conviction thereof, be subject to imprisonment for not more than one year, or a fine of not more than $1,000, or both.section 1211 of this title
notes: Transfer of FunctionsFunctions of Secretary of Commerce and Federal Trade Commission under this chapter transferred to Consumer Product Safety Commission, see .section 2079 of this title
